fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate` is a struct that pairs a variation axis tag with its current design-space value. Use an array or span of these coordinates to specify or inspect the variation position of a variable font.

Pass coordinates to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(System.ReadOnlySpan{SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate})> or set them on <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.VariationDesignPosition>. Read the current position from <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignPosition>.

## Examples

```csharp
using var typeface = SKTypeface.FromFile("Roboto-Variable.ttf");

var coords = new[]
{
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate
    {
        Axis = new SKFourByteTag('w', 'g', 'h', 't'),
        Value = 700f
    }
};

using var bold = typeface.Clone(coords.AsSpan());
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Pairs a variation axis tag with its design-space coordinate value.
